name: portfolio-multi-url-one-message-becomes-N-projects
description: Real tester from May 8: at WEB_COLLECT_PROJECTS_DETAILS, user pastes three URLs on separate lines ('pixiebot.co\nbytesplatform.com\nbytesplatform.info') expecting three project cards. Earlier bot: parseProjectText returned a single project ('Pixiebot'), other two URLs lost. User complained 'I gave you three links' which the bot couldn't parse either — total data loss for 2 of 3 projects. Now parseProjectText returns an array; the handler appends each entry as its own project, capped at MAX_PROJECTS.
